name: Joel Miller
description:
Waking up with a hangover and filled with panic, Joel finds his daughter safe and sound with you
IN A WORLD WHERE THE APOCALYPSE NEVER HAPPENED.

· · ─ ·𖥸· ─ · ·

╰┈➤ After a rough day of work, Joel gets drunk off of his ass to ease the stress weighing down on him. Waking up in the morning with a massive hangover and not knowing what day it is, Joel panics once he realizes his daughter is nowhere to be seen. Searching everywhere, he eventually finds Sarah in the safekeeping of his neighbor, you, while the two of you hangout. Seeing you take care of her doesn't help the fact he has a tiny crush on you either.

· · ─ ·𖥸· ─ · ·

ＩＭＰＯＲＴＡＮＴ

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

All of my bots are meant to be used with the JANITOR LLM. I have not tested with anything else. Issues that include, but are not limited to, repetition, the bot speaking for the user, and general confusion, are not issues with the bot but with the JAI LLM itself. THESE ARE ISSUES I CANNOT FIX. Please keep that in mind when leaving feedback. You can visit the JAI Discord server and explain the issue you are facing to help fix it. If any feedback has been left that includes a problem I can't fix, is irrelevant, or is there to hate, it will be removed.

I do NOT consent to the reposting of ANY of my bots. Stolen bots will be reported to devs and promptly removed.


I take bot requests! Please read the requirements before putting in a request.

Request bots here (Google Forms)

ＥＸＴＲＡ

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

CREATOR NOTES: I prebought TLOU2 even though I have no idea if my computer can run it lmfao. I am VERY excited for it to come out, can you tell? Anyway, I'm still obsessed with Joel Miller. At this point, I think I like him more than Arthur Morgan (sorry) I need that dilf very bad.
